hero.title: Explore Tanzania's Wonders
hero.description: At Hadada Safari, we specialize in creating exceptional safari experiences that connect you to Tanzania's breathtaking landscapes, vibrant cultures, and magnificent wildlife.

destinations.label: Destinations
destinations.title: Discover Tanzania's Top Destinations
destinations.description: From the breathtaking peak of Kilimanjaro to the idyllic shores of Zanzibar, every corner tells a story.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three Simple Steps
howItWorks.description: Planning your dream safari is easier than you think
howItWorks.step1Description: Tell us about your dream safari — your interests, preferred dates, group size, and budget. We listen to every detail.
howItWorks.step2Description: Our experts design a tailor-made itinerary just for you, handpicking lodges, routes, and experiences that match your vision.
howItWorks.step3Description: Arrive in Tanzania and immerse yourself in the journey of a lifetime. We handle every detail so you can focus on the wonder.

memories.label: Memories That Last
memories.title: Ready to Create Memories That Last Forever?
memories.description: At Hadada Safari, every journey is more than just a trip — it's a collection of moments that you'll cherish forever. From witnessing majestic wildlife up close to sharing laughter under the African sky, your adventure is waiting.

safariCrafting.label: Expert Craftsmanship
safariCrafting.title: Crafting Exceptional Safaris
safariCrafting.description1: From thrilling game drives in the Serengeti to serene moments in the Ngorongoro Crater, our expertly crafted itineraries ensure you experience the very best of Tanzania's wildlife and landscapes.
safariCrafting.description2: Every detail of your safari is thoughtfully planned — from the luxury lodges you'll stay in, to the hidden gems only our experienced guides know about.

bestTime.label: Plan Your Trip
bestTime.title: Best Time to Visit
bestTime.description: Tanzania is incredible year-round, but each season offers something unique
bestTime.drySeasonDescription: Peak safari season. Animals gather around water sources, making sightings exceptional. The Great Migration river crossings happen in the Serengeti.
bestTime.greenSeasonDescription: Lush landscapes, fewer crowds, and lower rates. Great for birdwatching and photography. Calving season brings predator action in the Southern Serengeti.
bestTime.shoulderSeasonDescription: Short dry spell within the green season. Perfect for Kilimanjaro treks and calving season in Ndutu. Warm days and mild nights.

itineraries.label: Itineraries
itineraries.title: Curated Safari Experiences
itineraries.description: Choose from our handpicked itineraries or let us customize one just for you

kilimanjaro.label: Mt. Kilimanjaro
kilimanjaro.title: Conquer Africa's Highest Peak
kilimanjaro.description: At 5,895 meters (19,341 feet), Mount Kilimanjaro is Africa's highest mountain and the world's tallest free-standing mountain. Our expert guides will lead you through diverse climatic zones from tropical rainforest to arctic summit, ensuring the best chance of reaching Uhuru Peak.
kilimanjaro.machameDescription: The most popular route with stunning scenery through diverse climatic zones.
kilimanjaro.lemoshoDescription: A longer, more scenic approach with excellent acclimatization profile.
kilimanjaro.maranguDescription: The only route with hut accommodation, also known as the Coca-Cola route.
kilimanjaro.umbweDescription: The shortest and steepest route, ideal for experienced trekkers.
kilimanjaro.rongaiDescription: The only route approaching from the north, offering a wilderness experience.
kilimanjaro.shiraDescription: A dramatic start at high altitude on the Shira Plateau with spectacular views.

balloon.label: Once In A Lifetime
balloon.title: Experience the Serengeti From Above
balloon.description: Float silently over the endless plains as the sun rises, witnessing herds of wildlife from a perspective few ever experience. Our balloon safaris are the crown jewel of any Tanzanian adventure.

photoGallery.label: Gallery
photoGallery.title: Safari Moments
photoGallery.description: A glimpse into the extraordinary experiences awaiting you in Tanzania — click any image to explore

value.label: Why Choose Us
value.title: The Hadada Difference
value.description: We go above and beyond to make your Tanzanian safari an experience of a lifetime. Every journey is backed by our promise of value, customization, and unwavering support.
value.greatValueDescription: We put in extra effort to ensure you get full value and the best deals through your stay. Our team negotiates exclusive rates with premium lodges and camps, passing savings directly to you without compromising on quality.
value.customizationDescription: Tell us about your dream trip and we'll tailor every detail to meet your exact requirements. Whether you want photography-focused, family-friendly, or exclusive luxury experiences, we design it around you.
value.supportDescription: We provide assistance from the planning phase through your entire stay. Our dedicated team is available 24/7 to ensure your journey is seamless, safe, and stress-free from landing to departure.

sustainability.label: Sustainability
sustainability.title: Travel With Purpose
sustainability.description: At Hadada Safaris, we believe that extraordinary travel and environmental responsibility go hand in hand. Every safari we craft not only creates memories for you — it contributes to preserving Tanzania's wild heritage for generations to come.
sustainability.conservationDescription: We partner with parks and reserves that prioritize wildlife conservation. A portion of every safari goes directly to protecting Tanzania's endangered species and their habitats.
sustainability.communityDescription: We employ local guides, support Maasai women's cooperatives, and invest in village education programs. Your safari directly benefits the communities you visit.
sustainability.ecoDescription: From carbon-offset transportation to plastic-free camps, we minimize our environmental footprint. Our partner lodges use solar power and sustainable water management.
sustainability.responsibleDescription: We enforce strict wildlife viewing guidelines to ensure animals are never disturbed. Our safaris promote observation, not interference, preserving the natural balance.

tripAdvisor.label: Testimonials
tripAdvisor.title: What Our Travelers Say
tripAdvisor.description: Real experiences from travelers who discovered the magic of Tanzania with us

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Common Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know before your Tanzanian adventure
faq.q1: What is the best time to go on safari in Tanzania?
faq.a1: The best time for a safari in Tanzania is during the dry season from June to October. This is when animals gather around water sources, making them easier to spot. The Great Migration river crossings in the Serengeti typically occur from July to September. However, the green season (November to May) offers lush landscapes, fewer crowds, and excellent birdwatching.
faq.q2: How far in advance should I book my safari?
faq.a2: We recommend booking at least 3-6 months in advance, especially for peak season (June-October) and if you want specific luxury lodges. For the Great Migration season, booking 8-12 months ahead is ideal. However, we can also accommodate last-minute bookings depending on availability.
faq.a3: Yes, Tanzania is one of the safest countries in East Africa for tourists. The people are warm and welcoming, and our experienced guides ensure your safety throughout your journey. We take every precaution to make your trip secure, from airport transfers to lodge selections in safe areas.
faq.q4: What should I pack for a safari?
faq.a4: Essentials include neutral-colored clothing (khaki, olive, brown), a wide-brimmed hat, sunscreen, binoculars, a camera with zoom lens, comfortable walking shoes, and layers for cool mornings and warm afternoons. We provide a detailed packing list upon booking confirmation.
faq.q5: Can I customize my safari itinerary?
faq.a5: Absolutely! That is our specialty. Every safari we create is tailored to your interests, budget, group size, and travel style. Whether you want to focus on wildlife photography, cultural immersion, luxury relaxation, or adventure activities, we design the perfect itinerary just for you.
faq.q6: What is included in the safari price?
faq.a6: Our safari packages typically include all accommodations, meals, park fees, ground transportation in 4x4 vehicles, professional English-speaking guides, and bottled water during game drives. International flights, visas, tips, and personal items are generally not included. We provide a clear breakdown with every quote.

about.heroSubtitle: Born from a love of Tanzania, we craft extraordinary journeys that connect travelers to the soul of Africa
about.storyP1: Hadada Safaris was founded with a simple yet powerful vision: to share the magic of Tanzania with the world in a way that honors the land, empowers local communities, and creates life-changing experiences for every traveler.
about.storyP2: Named after the Hadada Ibis — a bird whose distinctive call echoes across the Tanzanian landscape at dawn — our company embodies the spirit of awakening. Just as the Hadada signals the start of a new day in the bush, we mark the beginning of your most unforgettable adventure.
about.storyP3: With over 15 years of experience, we have guided thousands of travelers through Tanzania's most spectacular destinations, from the Serengeti plains to the peak of Kilimanjaro, always with an unwavering commitment to excellence, safety, and responsible tourism.
about.passionDesc: Every journey we craft is driven by our deep love for Tanzania's wildlife, landscapes, and people.
about.safetyDesc: Your safety is paramount. We maintain the highest standards in vehicles, guides, and emergency protocols.
about.detailDesc: From your preferred pillow type to the perfect sunset viewing spot, no detail is too small for us.
about.expertiseDesc: Born and raised in Tanzania, our team knows every hidden gem, secret trail, and cultural treasure.
about.excellenceDesc: We consistently earn top ratings because we never stop raising the bar for safari experiences.
about.communityDesc: We invest in local communities, employ local guides, and ensure tourism benefits everyone.
about.teamSubtitle: The passionate people behind your unforgettable Tanzania experience

campsLodges.title: Where Luxury Meets the Wild
campsLodges.description: We have carefully curated a collection of Tanzania's finest camps and lodges — each one selected for quality, location, service, and sustainability. These are not just places to stay; they are integral parts of your safari experience, offering front-row seats to nature's greatest spectacles while enveloping you in comfort and warmth.
campsLodges.readyTitle: Ready to Experience Luxury in the Wild?
campsLodges.readyDesc: Let our team match you with the perfect lodge for your safari. We know each property personally and will recommend the ideal fit for your style, budget, and dream itinerary.

flights.title: Fly to the Wild
flights.description: Tanzania is vast — and the best way to reach its most spectacular corners is by air. We partner with Tanzania's most trusted domestic airlines to ensure your journey between safari destinations is as smooth, safe, and scenic as the adventure itself.
flights.whyFlyTitle: Skip the Drive, Soar to Adventure
flights.whyFlyDesc: Flying isn't just faster — it's part of the experience. See Tanzania from a perspective few ever witness.
flights.saveTimeDesc: Skip 10+ hour drives and reach remote safari camps in under 2 hours from major hubs.
flights.safetyFirstDesc: All partner airlines meet international safety standards with modern, well-maintained fleets.
flights.scenicViewsDesc: Witness Tanzania's landscapes from above — volcanoes, craters, and endless plains.
flights.expertCoordinationDesc: We handle every booking, transfer, and schedule so you never have to worry.
flights.routesDesc: Our partner airlines service routes across Tanzania, from the northern circuit to the remote southern parks.
flights.routesNote: * All routes and times are approximate and subject to seasonal schedules. Charter flights available on request.
flights.ctaDesc: All domestic flights are included in our safari packages. We handle every booking, transfer, and schedule so you can focus on the adventure ahead.

itinerariesPage.label: Safari Itineraries
itinerariesPage.title: Journeys Designed to Inspire
itinerariesPage.description: Every itinerary we craft is a carefully orchestrated journey through Tanzania's most spectacular landscapes. From the legendary Serengeti to the untouched southern parks, each trip is designed to maximize your time in the wild while enveloping you in comfort and authenticity.
itinerariesPage.ctaDesc: Tell us your dream, your timeline, and your budget — and we'll craft the perfect itinerary from scratch. Every safari is personal, and no two are ever the same.

destinationsPage.heroSubtitle: From the peak of Kilimanjaro to the shores of Zanzibar, discover the incredible diversity of Tanzania
destinationsPage.label: All Destinations
destinationsPage.title: Tanzania's Treasures
destinationsPage.description: Each destination offers a unique piece of the Tanzanian puzzle

kilimanjaroPage.heroSubtitle: Conquer Africa's highest peak — 5,895m of pure determination and breathtaking beauty
kilimanjaroPage.overviewP1: Mount Kilimanjaro is Africa's highest mountain and the world's tallest free-standing peak. Rising 5,895 meters above the Tanzanian plains, it offers climbers the extraordinary experience of passing through five distinct climate zones — from tropical rainforest to arctic glacier.
kilimanjaroPage.overviewP2: No technical climbing skills are required, making it accessible to anyone with good fitness and determination. Our experienced mountain guides, porters, and chefs ensure your safety and comfort throughout the journey.
